title: Unable to create draft
description: The application displays an error when the customer creates a new draft.

title: Team schedule not loading
description: The league schedule page remains blank after the customer signs in.

title: Schedule changes not saved
description: Updates to the league schedule are lost after saving.

title: Statistics report is incomplete
description: The generated statistics report does not include the latest match results.

title: Unable to add team member
description: The customer receives a validation error when adding a new team member.

title: Training session duplicated
description: A training session appears twice after the calendar is refreshed.

title: Player notes not updating
description: Changes made to player notes are not displayed on the dashboard.

title: Incorrect budget total
description: The displayed budget total does not match the sum of recorded expenses.

title: Scout report export failed
description: The customer cannot export the scout analysis report as a PDF file.

title: Candidate search returns no results
description: The recruitment search returns no candidates when valid filters are selected.

title: Medical record attachment missing
description: An uploaded attachment is not visible after the medical record is saved.

title: Login session expires early
description: The customer is signed out shortly after opening the team management page.
